name: Equitrans Midstream Corporation
description: Equitrans Midstream Corporation is one of the largest natural gas gatherers in the United States, with midstream operations focused primarily in the Appalachian Basin. The company provides natural gas transmission, storage, gathering, and water services to various producers, utilities, and marketing companies. Equitrans Midstream owns and operates an extensive network of pipelines and storage facilities, supporting the delivery of clean-burning natural gas to key markets in the Northeast, Mid-Atlantic, and Southeast regions.
